'''O'nja Rambolt''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] who lived on [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he believed that he could escape his massive financial debts by gaining a life sentence on the [[Oovo IV/Legends|Oovo IV]] [[Desolation Alley|prison]]. However, he was caught by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]]-turned [[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
